params.name: Trojan Horse
params.source: Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Wishing (0.09%)
params.description:
On Sep 23, 1183 BC, the Greeks' huge wooden horse was used to capture the city of Troy. 

In the Trojan War, the Greeks joined forces to attack Troy. Troy's mighty defenses successfully repelled the Greeks for nine years. But Odysseus had a plan. The Greek warships suddenly retreated, leaving behind a giant wooden horse, which the Trojans believed to be a gift. After the Trojans brought the wooden horse inside the city walls, Greek warriors hidden in the wooden horse climbed out and took the cit …
